## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce and train the team on a new standardized process for client onboarding and management, emphasizing consistency, transparency, and proactive communication.](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A new structured workflow using Notion templates has been implemented for client onboarding, research, and ongoing management](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Weekly updates and transparent communication are critical for client satisfaction and managing expectations](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Team members need to audit their current accounts and ensure all documentation is up-to-date by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [New automated workflows for assignment creation and content generation are being developed to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Topics

### New Client Onboarding Process

  - [Introduced a standardized Notion template for client workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Workflow includes company research, competitor analysis, and audience research](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Emphasis on thorough preparation before kickoff calls to build trust and value early](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Communication and Transparency

  - [Weekly updates in both Slack and Notion are mandatory for all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Meeting notes, action items, and progress updates should be clearly documented](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Proactive communication about blockers and challenges is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Automated Workflows

  - [New temporal-based runtime for improved efficiency and parallelization](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Workflows for company research, competitor analysis, and audience research demonstrated](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Upcoming workflows for assignment creation and content generation in development](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Client Expectations and Deliverables

  - [Focus on publishing agreed-upon content consistently, rather than creating large backlogs of assignments](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Importance of quality in calibration articles and meeting weekly publishing goals](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Need for up-to-date performance metrics and health metrics for all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

### Account Management Best Practices

  - [Building relationships with multiple stakeholders on the client side](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Conducting basic SEO audits and research before kickoff calls](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Using synced blocks in Notion for efficient updates across multiple sections](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=2111.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to audit all current accounts and update Notion workspaces by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Implement weekly updates consistently for all clients](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Attend next week's 2-hour training session on new assignment creation and content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=3815.0)
  - [Begin conducting regular account reviews on Mondays](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=3977.0)
  - [Prepare thoroughly for upcoming kickoffs (Fixes and Set) using the new process](https://fathom.video/share/AvMyuisf2EsUiozX4kB_qMSEcmxVPsrx?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
